nasb.text: “Now on the eighth day he is to take two male lambs without defect, and a yearling ewe lamb without defect, and three-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, and one log of oil;

esv.text: “And on the eighth day he shall take two male lambs without blemish, and one ewe lamb a year old without blemish, and a grain offering of three tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil, and one log of oil.

cnv.text: “第八天，他要取兩隻沒有殘疾的公羊羔和一隻沒有殘疾一歲的母羊羔，又要把調油的細麵三公斤作素祭，以及三分之一公升油一同取來。

ccb.text: “第八天，他要带来两只毫无残疾的公羊羔、一只毫无残疾的一岁母羊羔、三公斤作素祭的调油的细面粉和一杯油。
